hero.label: Made for Alex
hero.headline: I’d help Alex turn strong product pull into a tighter top-of-funnel machine.
hero.subheadline: I’ve already done the grindy part before, outbound, prospecting, qualification, sequencing, and booking meetings. Alex is the kind of AI recruiting product where sharp outreach actually matters because the value prop is concrete and urgent.

whyCompany.title: The product is easy to care about
whyCompany.body: Alex is not vague AI hype. It helps companies source, screen, and schedule faster, which means every SDR conversation can stay tied to a clear outcome: better hiring signals in less time.

whyCompany.title: I fit the stage and the role
whyCompany.body: You want someone who can do the unglamorous pipeline work well. I spent a year as a BDR at Copygen.ai and learned how to prospect consistently, handle rejection, and keep moving volume without losing personalization.

whyCompany.title: I understand the buyer shift happening now
whyCompany.body: Because I’ve been tinkering with OpenClaw agents and GTM automation, I get why AI products win when they save teams real time immediately. That makes me better at telling the story in a way hiring leaders actually respond to.

quote: If Alex is building the future of hiring, I’d love to be one of the people creating the first conversations that bring customers in.
